name: Exhibition:Michelangelo, Leonardo, Raphael
description: Discover the rivalry and brilliance of Michelangelo, Leonardo, and Raphael in this exceptional Renaissance exhibition.
detail: Michelangelo, Leonardo, and Raphael: Legends of the RenaissanceAt the turn of the 16th century, three giants of the Italian Renaissance—Michelangelo, Leonardo da Vinci, and Raphael—found themselves in Republican Florence, competing for the attention of the city’s most powerful patrons.On January 25, 1504, Florence’s foremost artists convened to decide on the ideal placement for Michelangelo’s nearly completed David. Among them was Leonardo da Vinci, who, like Michelangelo, had recently returned to his hometown.This exhibition opens with Michelangelo’s renowned Taddei Tondo and explores the fierce rivalry between Michelangelo and Leonardo, while also highlighting their significant influence on the emerging talent of Raphael.Visitors will discover exceptional examples of Italian Renaissance drawings, including Leonardo’s Burlington House Cartoon and preparatory sketches by both Leonardo and Michelangelo for their monumental mural projects commissioned for the Palazzo Vecchio’s council hall.Organised by the Royal Academy of Arts, London, in partnership with the Royal Collection Trust and the National Gallery, London, this exhibition offers a rare insight into the creative brilliance of these iconic artists.

name: Exhibition:Brasil! Brasil! The Birth of Modernism
description: An exhibition showcasing over 130 works by key 20th-century Brazilian artists, capturing the essence of Brazilian Modernism.
detail: A major exhibition featuring over 130 works by ten significant Brazilian artists from the twentieth century, showcasing the diversity of Brazilian art from that period.In the early 20th century, a new form of modern art began emerging in Brazil. From the 1910s through the 1970s, Brazilian artists were adapting contemporary trends, international influences, and artistic traditions to create a new type of modern art—one deeply informed by Brazil's vibrant cultures, identities, and landscapes.Everyday life in Brazil became a central theme of this new modernism, with Indigenous identity and Afro-Brazilian experiences among the many influences these artists drew upon. This was a group of people looking inward at their rich cultural resources to set a new course for modernism, which had a profound impact across South America.The exhibition will offer an expanded view of Brazilian Modernism to UK audiences, featuring works by artists who have historically received less exposure in this country, such as Anita Malfatti, who led the movement, and Tarsila do Amaral, now internationally celebrated as a leading female figure of Brazilian Modernism. The exhibition will also include works by self-taught artists like Alfredo Volpi and Djanira da Motta e Silva, an artist of Indigenous descent, Afro-Brazilian artist Rubem Valentim, and performance artist Flávio de Carvalho.The majority of works come from rare Brazilian private collections, as well as Brazilian public collections, most of which have never been exhibited in the UK.Exhibition organized by the Zentrum Paul Klee, Bern, in collaboration with the Royal Academy of Arts, London.Our Friends preview days will take place on 24 January, 10 am–9 pm, 25 January, 10 am–6 pm, and 26 January, 10 am–6 pm.

name: Standup comedy:Bakesmouth Live
description: Nigerian comedian Basketmouth returns to indigo at The O2 in February 2025.
detail: At Basketmouth Live London 2025, you'll experience an evening of hilarious stand-up comedy by Nigerian comedian Basketmouth. Enjoy his unique blend of global and African humor, as he shares relatable and insightful stories about everyday life, culture, and social issues. Expect a night filled with laughter and a vibrant atmosphere as Basketmouth brings his sharp wit and observational comedy to the stage. It's a perfect opportunity for fans to enjoy top-tier comedy from one of Africa's leading comedians.

name: Carnivel:Saturday Stand Up Comedy Club
description: Leicester Square offers a vibrant mix of top international comedians and dinner-and-show packages every Thursday to Saturday
detail: Comedy Carnival in Leicester Square offers an unmissable comedy experience, showcasing a rotating roster of award-winning international comedians. The shows take place every Thursday, Friday, and Saturday night, delivering some of the best stand-up comedy in London. The venue offers a range of dinner and show packages, providing the perfect setting for a night out with friends, family, or colleagues. Whether you're new to comedy or a seasoned fan, Comedy Carnival ensures a vibrant and fun-filled atmosphere, with unfiltered, unapologetic humor guaranteed to leave you in stitches.With a reputation for providing top-tier entertainment, the comedy lineup at Comedy Carnival always features some of the most exciting comedic talent from around the world. It's the ideal spot for anyone looking for a lively, entertaining evening. This is the perfect place to enjoy premium comedy, whether you’re celebrating a special occasion or simply looking for a night of laughter.The venue is conveniently located in the heart of Leicester Square, one of London's most iconic areas, making it easy to enjoy a night out in the city's entertainment district. For the latest details on show schedules and the list of comedians performing

name: Concert:Rojda Concert
detail: Get ready for an extraordinary evening as **Rojda** takes the stage at the iconic **Dominion Centre in London** for a concert experience like no other. Known for her soul-stirring voice and magnetic stage presence, Rojda has captivated audiences worldwide with her heartfelt performances and unique musical style. This concert isn’t just an event—it’s a journey through emotions, culture, and artistry, brought to life by an artist who pours her heart into every note. Whether you're a lifelong fan or discovering her music for the first time, you'll be swept away by her ability to connect deeply with her audience. From powerful ballads that tug at your heartstrings to upbeat anthems that will have you dancing in your seat, Rojda’s performance promises an electrifying atmosphere where every moment feels magical. The **Dominion Centre**, renowned for hosting some of the finest musical acts, provides the perfect backdrop for this unforgettable night. With state-of-the-art acoustics, dynamic lighting, and an intimate setting, every attendee will feel as if they are part of something truly special. Beyond the music, the evening is a celebration of passion, resilience, and the universal language of song. Tickets are selling fast, and with good reason—this is a one-night-only event that you simply cannot afford to miss. So mark your calendars, invite your friends, and get ready to witness a performance that will leave you speechless. **Join us at the Dominion Centre for an unforgettable night with Rojda—where music meets magic!** 🎤✨

name: Concert:New Year 2025 Concert
location: Church of St John the Evangelist, London
description: Come join us for a night of music and celebration at the Church of St John the Evangelist
detail: Get ready to welcome 2025 with an unforgettable night of music, joy, and celebration at the magnificent Church of St John the Evangelist! This historic venue, with its stunning architecture and rich acoustics, will set the perfect stage for an enchanting evening filled with soulful melodies and captivating performances. Join us as talented artists from various genres come together to create a musical experience that will leave you inspired and energized for the year ahead. From powerful vocal performances to mesmerizing instrumental solos, each act promises to deliver something truly special.This in-person event isn’t just a concert—it’s a celebration of new beginnings, shared moments, and the universal love for music. The Church of St John the Evangelist, renowned for its warm and intimate atmosphere, offers the ideal setting to connect with friends, family, and fellow music enthusiasts as we count down to an exciting new year. Whether you're a passionate music lover or simply looking for a unique way to start 2025, this concert is sure to exceed your expectations.Imagine the sounds of violins echoing through the grand arches, the harmonious blend of choirs filling the air, and the collective energy of a crowd united by music. Tickets are selling fast, so don’t miss your chance to be part of this magical evening. Mark your calendars, gather your loved ones, and join us for an experience that promises to be the highlight of your New Year celebrations.
